channel.title: Stop custom home page from refreshing
channel.description:
I have created a custom home page and I am using the menu from WordPress admin. The links work fine, but when I click on the link for the Home it refreshes the site. But the other pages do not refresh, and they come from WP.
How do I stop it from refreshing? Do I need to use tiny-router? In that case, where do I put the code?
Thanks!

item.title: Stop custom home page from refreshing
item.dc:creator: s74
item.description:
Thanks! But now I tried putting a custom link in the WordPress admin menu and only giving the link “/”, and then it worked also :).

Read full topic
item.source: Stop custom home page from refreshing

item.title: Stop custom home page from refreshing
item.dc:creator: UnicornCoder
item.description:
I believe it’s correct, the navigation component by default in mars-theme is configured this way looking for the name of the state:

const Nav = ({ state }) => (
  <NavContainer>
    {state.theme.menu.map(([name, link]) => {
      // Check if the link matched the current page url
      const data = state.source.get(state.router.link);
      const isCurrentPage = data.route === link;

      return (
        <NavItem key={name}>
          {/* If link url is the current page, add `aria-current` for a11y */}
          <Link link={link} aria-current={isCurrentPage ? "page" : undefined}>
            {name}
          </Link>
        </NavItem>
      );
    })}
  </NavContainer>
);

Read full topic
item.source: Stop custom home page from refreshing

item.title: Stop custom home page from refreshing
item.dc:creator: s74
item.description:
Hi again,
I think I solved it. But don’t know if it is the right thing to do. So that WP generates all but the link for Home.
Like this:

 <Menu>
      <Link
        link="/"
        css={css`
          color: orange;
          text-decoration: none;
          margin-right: 1em;
        `}
      >
        Home
      </Link>
      {items.map((item) => {
        return (
          <nav key={item.ID}>
            <Link
              link={item.url}
              css={css`
                color: orange;
                text-decoration: none;
                margin-right: 1em;
              `}
            >
              {item.title}
            </Link>
          </nav>

Read full topic
item.source: Stop custom home page from refreshing

item.title: Stop custom home page from refreshing
item.dc:creator: s74
item.description:
Hi,
Thank you for your reply!
But I am getting the menu generated from WP, so where do I put the Link component?

Read full topic
item.source: Stop custom home page from refreshing

item.title: Stop custom home page from refreshing
item.dc:creator: MDS_N
item.description:
Hi,
you should use the Link component.
I had the same “error” with “a” instead of Link.
Because the Link component routes it internal.

Read full topic
item.source: Stop custom home page from refreshing

item.description:
I have created a custom home page and I am using the menu from WordPress admin.
The links work fine, but when I click on the link for the Home it refreshes the site. But the other pages do not refresh, and they come from WP.

How do I stop it from refreshing?

Thanks!
